name: kbd
description: A keyboard-key badge: the small recessed pill that shows a shortcut key (Ctrl, Cmd, Esc). Renders the semantic <kbd> element (screen-reader-correct), token-styled with the muted fill + a 1px border. Ships the KbdGroup child partial (data-slot=kbd-group) that wraps several keys as one shortcut (e.g. 'Ctrl + K'). Server-first PARTIAL, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the kbd partial (+ its kbd/group child) to your JTE root at lievit/kbd.jte, reached as @template.lievit.kbd(key="Esc"). Pass key for plain text or a content slot for rich children (content wins). Group several keys into one shortcut with @template.lievit.kbd.group(content=@`@template.lievit.kbd(key="Ctrl") + @template.lievit.kbd(key="K")`). The source is yours: edit freely.
